epithet: the Wolfbrother, Lord of the Two Rivers

epithet: the Amyrlin Seat, the Flame of Tar Valon

epithet: the Wisdom who broke the limits of Healing

name: Elayne Trakand
epithet: Daughter-Heir of Andor, the Green

name: Aviendha
epithet: Maiden of the Spear, Wise One of the Aiel

name: Min Farshaw
epithet: the viewer who reads the future in images

name: Moiraine Damodred
epithet: the Blue who spent forty years on one cause

name: Cadsuane Melaidhrin
epithet: the most renowned living Aes Sedai

name: Siuan Sanche
epithet: the fisherman's daughter who became Amyrlin

name: Verin Mathwin
epithet: the Brown who wore the enemy's coat for seventy years

name: Pevara Tazanovni
epithet: the Red who bonded the Black Tower

name: al'Lan Mandragoran
epithet: the uncrowned King of Malkier, the Warder

name: Thom Merrilin
epithet: the gleeman with a sword in his heart

name: Loial
epithet: the Ogier who went Outside, the author

name: Tam al'Thor
epithet: the blademaster who found the Dragon on the mountain

name: Birgitte Silverbow
epithet: the Hero of the Horn, ripped from the Wheel

name: Tuon Athaem Kore Paendrag
epithet: Empress of the Seanchan, Daughter of the Nine Moons

name: The Dark One
epithet: the imprisoned source of the Shadow

name: Ishamael
epithet: the Betrayer of Hope, first of the Forsaken

name: Moridin

name: Lanfear
epithet: the most powerful of the Forsaken, who loved the Dragon

name: Graendal
epithet: the hedonist who breaks minds

name: Demandred
epithet: the general consumed by the Dragon's shadow

name: Padan Fain
epithet: the peddler of madness, a hatred all its own

name: The Wheel of Time
epithet: the loom of the Ages

name: The One Power

name: The Aes Sedai

name: The Aiel
epithet: the People of the Dragon, who do not touch a sword

name: The Wise Ones
